studyName: Gut Microbiome and Types of Colorectal Polyps

tables.description: Subject ID, study, sex, race, age, familial polyposis, participant Crohn disease, ulcerative colitis, and gastrointestinal cancer, colonoscopy, anastomosis, carcinoid, inflammatory bowel disease, polyp(s), blood in stool or rectal bleeding, normal/non-polyp histology, sessile serrated adenoma(s), tubular adenoma(s), and tubulovillous adenoma of participants with or without colorectal polyps and involved in the "Gut Microbiome and Types of Colorectal Polyps" project.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

variables.name: add_astomosis
variables.description: Additional finding at colonoscopy was previous anastomosis

variables.name: add_carc
variables.description: Additional finding at colonoscopy was carcinoid tumor

variables.name: add_ibd
variables.description: Additional finding at colonoscopy was inflammatory bowel disease

variables.name: age
variables.description: Age of subject

variables.name: antib
variables.description: Antibiotic use in previous 30 days from stool collection

variables.name: ascen
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in ascending colon at colonoscopy

variables.name: bmi
variables.description: Body mass index of subject

variables.name: cecum
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in cecum at colonoscopy

variables.name: desc
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in descending colon at colonoscopy

variables.name: dr_crohn
variables.description: Self-reported Crohn disease

variables.name: dr_fpolyp
variables.description: Self-reported familial polyposis

variables.name: dr_ulc
variables.description: Self-reported ulcerative colitis

variables.name: hepflex
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in hepatic flexure at colonoscopy

variables.name: hyper
variables.description: Presence of hyperplastic polyp(s) at colonoscopy

variables.name: ind_blood
variables.description: Indication for colonoscopy was blood in stool or rectal bleeding

variables.name: ind_can
variables.description: Indication for colonoscopy was personal history of gastrointestinal cancer

variables.name: ind_inf_disease
variables.description: Indication for colonoscopy was inflammatory bowel disease, colitis, or other related conditions

variables.name: normal
variables.description: Presence of normal/non-polyp histology polyp(s) at colonoscopy

variables.name: other_hist
variables.description: Presence of polyp with unclassified histology at colonoscopy

variables.name: poly_his
variables.description: History of colorectal polyps other than study colonoscopy

variables.name: race
variables.description: Race of subject

variables.name: rec
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in rectum at colonoscopy

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of subject

variables.name: sig
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in sigmoid colon at colonoscopy

variables.name: splenflex
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in splenic flexure at colonoscopy

variables.name: ssa
variables.description: Presence of sessile serrated adenoma(s) at colonoscopy

variables.name: ssa_dysplasia
variables.description: Presence of sessile serrated adenoma(s) with dysplasia at colonoscopy

variables.name: study
variables.description: Study in which the subject participated

variables.name: ta
variables.description: Presence of tubular adenoma(s) at colonoscopy

variables.name: tasize
variables.description: Size of any tubular adenomas at colonoscopy

variables.name: time_days
variables.description: Days from stool collection to colonoscopy

variables.name: transv
variables.description: Presence of polyp(s) in transverse colon at colonoscopy

variables.name: tva
variables.description: Presence of tubulovillous adenoma(s) at colonoscopy

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, and tumor status of participants with or without colorectal polyps and involved in the "Gut Microbiome and Types of Colorectal Polyps" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with or without colorectal polyps and involved in the "Gut Microbiome and Types of Colorectal Polyps" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: Subject ID and consent group participants with or without colorectal polyps and involved in the "Gut Microbiome and Types of Colorectal Polyps" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
